SELECT f.CDSCode,
       f.`School Name`,
       (f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / NULLIF(f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`,0)) AS free_rate

JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode

SELECT
    CDSCode,
    `Enrollment (K-12)` AS Enrollment,
    `Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS FreeMealCount,
    (`Free Meal Count (K-12)` / `Enrollment (K-12)`) AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM (
    SELECT
        CDSCode,
        `Enrollment (K-12)`,
        `Free Meal Count (K-12)`,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY `Enrollment (K-12)` DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
) AS ranked
WHERE rn IN (10, 11);	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH closed_counts AS (
  SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS closed_count
  FROM schools
  WHERE StatusType LIKE '%Closed%'
  GROUP BY County
),
max_count AS (
  SELECT County
  FROM closed_counts
  WHERE closed_count = (SELECT MAX(closed_count) FROM closed_counts)
)
SELECT s.School, s.ClosedDate
FROM schools s
JOIN max_count mc ON s.County = mc.County
WHERE s.StatusType LIKE '%Closed%';	----- bird -----	california_schools

    SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools
) AS a
JOIN (
    SELECT fname
    FROM (
        SELECT AdmFName1 AS fname FROM schools
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools
    )
    GROUP BY fname
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 2
) AS top_names ON a.fname = top_names.fname
WHERE a.fname IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.fname, a.District
ORDER BY a.fname, a.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

94:
WITH oldest_females AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
min_birth AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth FROM oldest_females
),
oldest AS (
    SELECT client_id, A11
    FROM oldest_females
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT min_birth FROM min_birth)
),
min_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_avg FROM oldest
),
selected AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM oldest
    WHERE A11 = (SELECT min_avg FROM min_avg)
),
accounts AS (
    SELECT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN selected s ON d.client_id = s.client_id
),
max_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(d2.A11) AS max_salary
    FROM district d2
    JOIN client c2 ON d2.district_id = c2.district_id
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (m.max_salary - (SELECT min_avg FROM min_avg)) AS gap
FROM accounts a
CROSS JOIN max_salary m;	----- bird -----	financial

FROM (

    WHERE fd.language = 'Spanish'
) AS sc
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS spanish
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT c.name
        FROM cards c
        JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid

630:
WITH user_posts AS (
  SELECT p.Tags
  FROM posts p
  JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
  WHERE u.DisplayName = 'John Salvatier'
),
tag_strings AS (
  SELECT Tags FROM user_posts
),
split AS (
  SELECT
    substr(Tags, 2, instr(Tags, '>')-2) AS tag,
    substr(Tags, instr(Tags, '>')+1) AS rest
  FROM tag_strings
  UNION ALL
  SELECT

WITH user_posts AS (
  SELECT p.Tags
  FROM posts p
  JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
  WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND p.CommentCount = 0
),
clean_tags AS (
  SELECT replace(replace(replace(UP.Tags, '><', ','), '<', ''), '>', '') AS tags_str
  FROM user_posts UP
),
split AS (
  SELECT
    substr(tags_str, 1, instr(tags_str, ',')-1) AS tag,
    substr(tags_str, instr(tags_str, ',')+1) AS rest
  FROM clean_tags
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, ',')-1),
    substr(rest, instr(rest, ',')+1)
  FROM split
  WHERE instr(rest, ',') > 0
),
final AS (
  SELECT tag FROM split
  UNION ALL
  SELECT rest AS tag FROM split WHERE instr(rest, ',') = 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM final;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

955:
SELECT c.year,
       AVG(
         CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600
         + CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60
         + CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,7,2) AS INTEGER)
         + CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0
       ) AS avg_seconds
FROM (
  SELECT dp.year, dp.driverId
  FROM (
    SELECT ra.year, r.driverId, SUM(r.points) AS total_points
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
    GROUP BY ra.year, r.driverId
  ) dp
  JOIN (
    SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points
    FROM (
      SELECT ra.year, r.driverId, SUM(r.points) AS total_points
      FROM results r
      JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
      GROUP BY ra.year, r.driverId
    )
    GROUP BY year
  ) mp ON dp.year = mp.year AND dp.total_points = mp.max_points
) c
JOIN results r ON r.driverId = c.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
  AND c.year < 1975
GROUP BY c.year
ORDER BY c.year;	----- bird -----	formula_1

    pa.vision,
    co.name AS country
FROM Player p

JOIN (
    SELECT match_id, home_player_1 AS player_api_id FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_2 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_3 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_4 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_5 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_6 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_7 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_8 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_9 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_10 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, home_player_11 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_1 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_2 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_3 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_4 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_5 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_6 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_7 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_8 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_9 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_10 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT match_id, away_player_11 FROM Match
) AS mp ON mp.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON m.id = mp.match_id

    THEN 0

1481:
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='SME'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='LAM'),0) AS SME_LAM,
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='LAM'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='KAM'),0) AS LAM_KAM,
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='KAM'),0) -
  COALESCE((SELECT total_consumption FROM cons WHERE Segment='SME'),0) AS KAM_SME
FROM (
  WITH cte AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, ym.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013'
  ),
  min_cust AS (
    SELECT Segment, CustomerID, Consumption
    FROM (
      SELECT Segment, CustomerID, Consumption,
             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY Consumption ASC) AS rn
      FROM cte
    )
    WHERE rn=1
  ),
  cons AS (
    SELECT Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    JOIN min_cust mc ON ym.CustomerID = mc.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013'
    GROUP BY Segment
  )
  SELECT 1
) AS dummy;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH seg_cons AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
seg_tot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total END) AS cons2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total END) AS cons2013
    FROM seg_cons
    GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons2013 - cons2012) / NULLIF(cons2013,0)) * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM seg_tot
)
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM seg_pct
ORDER BY pct ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT g.Country, COUNT(*) AS value_for_money_count
FROM gasstations g
JOIN (
    SELECT s.GasStationID
    FROM (
        SELECT GasStationID, AVG(Price / Amount) AS avg_unit_price
        FROM transactions_1k
        GROUP BY GasStationID
    ) s
    JOIN (
        SELECT AVG(Price / Amount) AS overall_avg_price
        FROM transactions_1k
    ) o
    ON s.avg_unit_price < o.overall_avg_price
) vs ON g.GasStationID = vs.GasStationID
GROUP BY g.Country
ORDER BY value_for_money_count DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT SUM(Amount) AS TotalSpent
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-01-31';

SELECT Date, Amount
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-24' AND Amount = 124.05
)
AND Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-01-31'
ORDER BY Date;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1525:
SELECT
    100.0 *
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID)
     FROM transactions_1k t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
       AND t.Date = '2012-08-25')
    /
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) AS percentage;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1526:
SELECT
  (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption END) -
   SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption END))
  / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption END) AS decrease_rate
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID = (
  SELECT CustomerID
  FROM transactions_1k
  WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1527:
SELECT GasStationID, SUM(Amount * Price) AS revenue
FROM transactions_1k
GROUP BY GasStationID
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1528:
SELECT
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) AS premium_percentage
FROM
    customers c
JOIN
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
JOIN
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE
    g.Country = 'SVK';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
    SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_spent,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '201201%' THEN Amount * Price END) AS january2012_spent
FROM
    transactions_1k
WHERE
    CustomerID = 38508;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1530:
SELECT p.Description
FROM products p
JOIN (
    SELECT ProductID, SUM(Amount) AS total
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY ProductID
    ORDER BY total DESC
    LIMIT 5
) t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1531:
SELECT
    top_spending.CustomerID,
    top_spending.total_spent,
    top_spending.total_price / top_spending.total_amount AS avg_price_per_item,
    c.Currency
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.CustomerID,
        SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(t.Price) AS total_price,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS total_amount
    FROM transactions_1k t
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS top_spending
JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = top_spending.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1532:

SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption
FROM yearmonth y
WHERE y.Date = '201208'
  AND y.CustomerID IN (
      SELECT t.CustomerID
      FROM transactions_1k t
      WHERE t.ProductID = 5
        AND t.Price / t.Amount > 29.0
  );	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
